description: A vertical 1080×1920 HyperFrames short — TTS-narrated talking-head over a face-cam loop, with karaoke-style word-synced captions, animated lower third, and a tiktok-follow overlay at the end. Mirrors the may-shorts-19 archetype from the HyperFrames student kit.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 竖版 1080×1920 HyperFrames 短视频 — TTS 语音旁白配真人出镜循环画面，带卡拉 OK 风格逐字同步字幕、动画下三分之一标题条，结尾附 TikTok 关注引导层。参照 HyperFrames 学生套件中的 may-shorts-19 原型。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 直式 1080×1920 HyperFrames 短影片 — TTS 語音旁白配真人出鏡循環畫面，帶卡拉 OK 風格逐字同步字幕、動畫下三分之一標題條，結尾附 TikTok 追蹤引導層。參照 HyperFrames 學生套件中的 may-shorts-19 原型。
description_i18n.ja: 縦型 1080×1920 HyperFrames ショート動画 — TTS ナレーション付きトーキングヘッドとフェイスカムループ映像に、カラオケスタイルの単語同期キャプション、アニメーション下三分割テロップ、最後に TikTok フォロー誘導オーバーレイを配置。HyperFrames 学生キットの may-shorts-19 アーキタイプを踏襲。
description_i18n.ko: 세로형 1080×1920 HyperFrames 숏폼 — TTS 내레이션이 있는 토킹헤드와 얼굴 캠 루프 영상에 노래방 스타일 단어 동기화 자막, 애니메이션 하단 자막, 마지막에 TikTok 팔로우 오버레이 포함. HyperFrames 학생 키트의 may-shorts-19 아키타입을 따름.
description_i18n.de: Vertikales 1080×1920 HyperFrames-Short — TTS-erzählter Talking-Head über Face-Cam-Loop mit Karaoke-Stil-Untertiteln in Wort-Synchronisation, animiertem Lower Third und TikTok-Follow-Overlay am Ende. Basiert auf dem may-shorts-19-Archetyp aus dem HyperFrames-Studentenkit.
description_i18n.fr: Court-métrage vertical HyperFrames 1080×1920 — talking-head narré par TTS sur boucle face-cam, avec sous-titres synchronisés mot par mot style karaoké, bandeau inférieur animé et overlay TikTok-follow en fin. Reprend l'archétype may-shorts-19 du kit étudiant HyperFrames.
description_i18n.ru: Вертикальный 1080×1920 HyperFrames-ролик — говорящая голова с TTS-озвучкой поверх зацикленного видео с лицом, с караоке-субтитрами с пословной синхронизацией, анимированной нижней третью и наложением призыва к подписке TikTok в конце. Повторяет архетип may-shorts-19 из студенческого набора HyperFrames.
description_i18n.es: Short vertical HyperFrames de 1080×1920 — talking-head narrado por TTS sobre loop de cámara facial, con subtítulos sincronizados palabra por palabra estilo karaoke, tercio inferior animado y overlay de seguimiento de TikTok al final. Refleja el arquetipo may-shorts-19 del kit estudiantil HyperFrames.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Short vertical HyperFrames 1080×1920 — talking-head narrado por TTS sobre loop de câmera facial, com legendas sincronizadas palavra por palavra estilo karaokê, lower third animado e overlay de follow do TikTok no final. Espelha o arquétipo may-shorts-19 do kit estudantil HyperFrames.
description_i18n.it: Short verticale HyperFrames 1080×1920 — talking-head narrato da TTS su loop face-cam, con didascalie sincronizzate parola per parola stile karaoke, lower third animato e overlay TikTok-follow alla fine. Rispecchia l'archetipo may-shorts-19 del kit studenti HyperFrames.
description_i18n.vi: Video ngắn HyperFrames dọc 1080×1920 — talking-head kể bằng TTS trên vòng lặp camera mặt, với phụ đề đồng bộ từng từ kiểu karaoke, lower third động và lớp phủ theo dõi TikTok ở cuối. Phản ánh nguyên mẫu may-shorts-19 từ bộ công cụ sinh viên HyperFrames.
description_i18n.pl: Pionowy short HyperFrames 1080×1920 — talking-head z narracją TTS na pętli face-cam, z napisami synchronizowanymi słowo po słowie w stylu karaoke, animowanym lower third i nakładką follow TikTok na końcu. Odzwierciedla archetyp may-shorts-19 z zestawu studenckiego HyperFrames.
description_i18n.id: Short vertikal HyperFrames 1080×1920 — talking-head bernarasi TTS di atas loop face-cam, dengan caption sinkron per kata gaya karaoke, lower third animasi, dan overlay follow TikTok di akhir. Mencerminkan arketipe may-shorts-19 dari kit pelajar HyperFrames.
description_i18n.nl: Verticale 1080×1920 HyperFrames-short — TTS-vertelde talking-head over face-cam-loop, met karaoke-stijl woordgesynchroniseerde ondertitels, geanimeerde lower third en TikTok-follow-overlay aan het einde. Weerspiegelt het may-shorts-19-archetype uit de HyperFrames-studentenkit.
description_i18n.ar: فيديو قصير عمودي HyperFrames 1080×1920 — رأس متحدث بسرد TTS فوق حلقة كاميرا الوجه، مع ترجمات متزامنة كلمة بكلمة بأسلوب الكاريوكي، وثلث سفلي متحرك، وطبقة متابعة TikTok في النهاية. يعكس نموذج may-shorts-19 من مجموعة الطلاب HyperFrames.
description_i18n.tr: Dikey 1080×1920 HyperFrames kısa videosu — yüz kamerası döngüsü üzerinde TTS anlatımlı konuşan baş, karaoke tarzı kelime senkronize altyazılar, animasyonlu alt üçüncü ve sonunda TikTok takip overlay'i. HyperFrames öğrenci kitindeki may-shorts-19 arketipini yansıtır.
description_i18n.uk: Вертикальний 1080×1920 HyperFrames-ролик — говоряча голова з TTS-озвученням поверх зациклено відео з обличчям, з караоке-субтитрами з пословною синхронізацією, анімованою нижньою третиною та накладенням заклику до підписки TikTok наприкінці. Відтворює архетип may-shorts-19 зі студентського набору HyperFrames.
description_i18n.en: A vertical 1080×1920 HyperFrames short — TTS-narrated talking-head over a face-cam loop, with karaoke-style word-synced captions, animated lower third, and a tiktok-follow overlay at the end. Mirrors the may-shorts-19 archetype from the HyperFrames student kit.

query.en:
Build a 25-second HyperFrames vertical short (1080×1920, 30fps) for a TikTok-style talking-head clip with karaoke captions. Generate the narration with `npx hyperframes tts` first, then transcribe word-level timings with `npx hyperframes transcribe`. Pull `npx hyperframes add tiktok-follow` and `npx hyperframes add yt-lower-third` (we'll use the lower-third as a name plate, mid-clip). Use the css-patterns reference for word highlighting (marker / clip-path / scatter).

Visual identity: warm canvas #1a1410, single hot accent #ff5e3a, off-white #fff8f1 for text. Display: "Druk Wide" 84px (or "Anton") for caption words; body "Inter" 26px for the lower-third name plate. Captions should be tone-adaptive — emphasis words pop with the marker-sweep pattern; numbers use clip-path slam.

Layer structure (root composition):
• Track 0: <video> face-cam.mp4 (muted, playsinline) full-bleed, slightly cropped, with a 8px inset border in #ff5e3a at 30% opacity.
• Track 1: <audio> narration.mp3 (data-volume=1) generated by `hyperframes tts`.
• Track 2: caption stack (sub-composition `captions.html` loaded via data-composition-src). Captions group by 2–3 words per chunk, max 28 chars per line, sit at y=78% of screen. Each word entry: y=24→0 + opacity 0→1 ease power3.out 0.18s, with the active word color-flipping to #ff5e3a on its own start frame (use tl.set(...) inside the timeline at the word's data-start, not at construction time). Exit by clip-path inset wipe over 0.12s right before the next chunk enters.
• Track 3: lower-third (`yt-lower-third` block, repurposed) entering at 5.0s from x=-360→0 ease expo.out 0.7s, holding 4s, exiting via the transition at 9.5s.
• Track 4: tiktok-follow overlay enters at 22.0s, holds to 25s end, no exit.

Non-negotiables: captions never overlap or run off-frame — use `window.__hyperframes.fitTextFontSize(...)` for any chunk longer than 22 chars; min font 60px on captions for legibility on mobile; deterministic only; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=25.

Quality: run `npx hyperframes lint`, then `npx hyperframes validate` (WCAG contrast must clear 4.5:1 against the face-cam frame at 5 sample timestamps), then `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 12`. Fix any overflow, then dispatch render. Output: `tiktok-karaoke-25s.mp4`.
query.zh-CN:
使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a 25-second HyperFrames vertical short (1080×1920, 30fps) for a TikTok-style talking-head clip with karaoke captions. Generate the narration with `npx hyperframes tts` first, then transcribe word-level timings with `npx hyperframes transcribe`. Pull `npx hyperframes add tiktok-follow` and `npx hyperframes add yt-lower-third` (we'll use the lower-third as a name plate, mid-clip). Use the css-patterns reference for word highlighting (marker / clip-path / scatter).

Visual identity: warm canvas #1a1410, single hot accent #ff5e3a, off-white #fff8f1 for text. Display: "Druk Wide" 84px (or "Anton") for caption words; body "Inter" 26px for the lower-third name plate. Captions should be tone-adaptive — emphasis words pop with the marker-sweep pattern; numbers use clip-path slam.

Layer structure (root composition):
• Track 0: <video> face-cam.mp4 (muted, playsinline) full-bleed, slightly cropped, with a 8px inset border in #ff5e3a at 30% opacity.
• Track 1: <audio> narration.mp3 (data-volume=1) generated by `hyperframes tts`.
• Track 2: caption stack (sub-composition `captions.html` loaded via data-composition-src). Captions group by 2–3 words per chunk, max 28 chars per line, sit at y=78% of screen. Each word entry: y=24→0 + opacity 0→1 ease power3.out 0.18s, with the active word color-flipping to #ff5e3a on its own start frame (use tl.set(...) inside the timeline at the word's data-start, not at construction time). Exit by clip-path inset wipe over 0.12s right before the next chunk enters.
• Track 3: lower-third (`yt-lower-third` block, repurposed) entering at 5.0s from x=-360→0 ease expo.out 0.7s, holding 4s, exiting via the transition at 9.5s.
• Track 4: tiktok-follow overlay enters at 22.0s, holds to 25s end, no exit.

Non-negotiables: captions never overlap or run off-frame — use `window.__hyperframes.fitTextFontSize(...)` for any chunk longer than 22 chars; min font 60px on captions for legibility on mobile; deterministic only; all timelines paused:true; root data-duration=25.

Quality: run `npx hyperframes lint`, then `npx hyperframes validate` (WCAG contrast must clear 4.5:1 against the face-cam frame at 5 sample timestamps), then `npx hyperframes inspect --samples 12`. Fix any overflow, then dispatch render. Output: `tiktok-karaoke-25s.mp4`.
